error_signature: Authorization failed – please check your credentials
title: Authorization failure with Fal.ai API
symptom: When sending a POST request to Fal.ai's veo3 endpoint, n8n returns 'Authorization failed – please check your credentials'.
applies_when: Sending a request to Fal.ai's veo3 endpoint
not_this_if: Credentials are valid and not exposed
root_cause: The error occurs because the API requires a different authorization method than what was initially used. Instead of 'Bearer', the API expects 'Key' as the authorization type, which can lead to authentication failures if not configured correctly.
fix_steps: Revoke the exposed API key immediately for security reasons
Change the authorization method from 'Bearer' to 'Key'
Create a Header Authorization in the HTTP Request node for the API key
agent_instruction: Update the authorization method to 'Key' and create a Header Authorization for the API key.
safety_notes: Revoke any exposed API keys to prevent unauthorized access.
